name: Management
overview: Aydin, who is a supporter of innovation, stands on the other side of a group of passive-minded old collectives who make plans to undermine him at every opportunity. After being appointed to the position, a fight begins between relatives who abuse the situation. Only with the support of his father, he begins to openly fight against the opposing force. After a while, Aydin decides to quit his job, thinking that this struggle is insignificant. The news that comes at that moment causes him to join this struggle again.
